query: modified Paris system interstitial brachytherapy loading pattern dwell time optimization
citations: [FOLFIRINOX or Gemcitabine as Adjuvant Therapy for Pancreatic Cancer.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/30575490/)
[Tocilizumab in systemic sclerosis: a randomised, double-blind, placebo-controlled, phase 3 trial.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/32866440/)
[Standardized Clinical Terms and Definitions for Interstitial Lung Disease: A Consensus Statement from the Fleischner Society.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/40758555/)

evidence.claim:
PubMed ID: 30575490. 2018/12/20 00:00. BACKGROUND: Among patients with metastatic pancreatic cancer, combination 
chemotherapy with fluorouracil, leucovorin, irinotecan, and oxaliplatin 
(FOLFIRINOX)
evidence.source_title: FOLFIRINOX or Gemcitabine as Adjuvant Therapy for Pancreatic Cancer.
evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 30575490. 2018/12/20 00:00. BACKGROUND: Among patients with metastatic pancreatic cancer, combination 
chemotherapy with fluorouracil, leucovorin, irinotecan, and oxaliplatin 
(FOLFIRINOX) leads to longer overall survival than gemcitabine therapy. We 
compared the efficacy and safety of a modified FOLFIRINOX regimen with 
gemcitabine as adjuvant therapy in patients with resected pancreatic cancer.
METHODS: We randomly assigned 493 patients with resected pancreatic ductal 
adenocarcino
evidence.search_query: modified Paris system interstitial brachytherapy loading pattern dwell time optimization
